metadata.title: Thai mission learning image source manifest
metadata.purpose: Stock-first, local-first image sourcing rules and scene manifest for Thai mission learning materials.

sourcePriority.label: directly prepared photos
sourcePriority.rule: Use a manually prepared local image first when it matches the lesson scene and quality standards.

sourcePriority.label: free or licensed stock photos
sourcePriority.rule: Use a stock photo when no approved local photo exists and the stock image clearly matches the lesson scene.

sourcePriority.label: AI-generated realistic image
sourcePriority.rule: Use AI generation only when no suitable local or stock image is available.

rejectTraits: theological symbolism without a real scene
sad or confrontational mood when the lesson goal is greeting, welcome, or blessing

stockSources.label: Unsplash
stockSources.licenseNote: Check current photo license and attribution requirements before publishing.

stockSources.label: Pexels
stockSources.licenseNote: Check current photo license and attribution requirements before publishing.

stockSources.label: Pixabay
stockSources.licenseNote: Check current photo license and attribution requirements before publishing.
